records.ety: [L.faecula burnt tartar or salt of tartar, dim. of faex, faecis, sediment, dregs: cf. F. fcule.]

defs: Any pulverulent matter obtained from plants by simply breaking down the texture, washing with water, and subsidence.
The nutritious part of wheat; starch or farina; -- called also amylaceous fecula.
The green matter of plants; chlorophyll.
